description: List of communal contributions or perhaps "sales of wheat[?]" (עלם מביע קמח) for the year 5589 AM which is 1828/29 CE (התקפט). Although the year is clearly rendered the disorderly scribal hand makes the nature of the list's purpose uncertain. Requires further examination.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה. מוחזק בכיא פריז.
